title: CMD.BSP.001.TIE.CLOSE_PRESCRIBER_OVERRIDE — Close prescriber override and resume algorithmic control
description: Payload of the CLOSE_PRESCRIBER_OVERRIDE command. Issued by POL.BSP.001.TIE.ON_ARBITRATION_ALGORITHM_REAFFIRMED, handled by AGG.BSP.001.TIE.TIER_OF_CASE. Atomically clears the active override and — when the algorithm-resolved tier differs from the override-applied tier (INV.TIE.005) — emits exactly one of BNK.RLVR.RVT.TIER_UPGRADE_RECORDED or BNK.RLVR.RVT.TIER_DOWNGRADE_RECORDED. Otherwise the closure is silent. Idempotent on trigger.event_id over a 30-day window.

override_id.description: Identifier of the override being closed. Must match the active override on the aggregate.

event_id.description: IDEMPOTENCY KEY. Identifier of the upstream BNK.RLVR.RVT.OVERRIDE_CLOSED event from BNK.RLVR.CAP.BSP.001.ARB.

algorithmic_tier_at_closure.description: Tier code the algorithm currently resolves to (computed by ARB at closure time). Compared against the override-applied tier to decide whether to emit a realignment transition (INV.TIE.005).

algorithmic_tier_score_event_id.description: Optional — the BNK.RLVR.RVT.SCORE_THRESHOLD_REACHED event id that produced algorithmic_tier_at_closure. Useful for audit lineage when realignment fires.

closure_reason.description: Free-text closure rationale carried over from BNK.RLVR.CAP.BSP.001.ARB (visible in audit trail).

closed_at.description: Timestamp at which BNK.RLVR.CAP.BSP.001.ARB closed the override (ISO-8601, UTC).
